title: Maa katyayani mantra
intro: Read the Maa Katyayani Mantra with its English meaning. Chant it with devotion to receive the blessings of Goddess Katyayani.
description:
Main Mantra

Om Devi Katyayanyai Namah.

English Meaning

Om,
I bow to
Goddess Katyayani.

faq.q1: When should Maa Katyayani Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: It is considered auspicious to chant the Maa Katyayani Mantra with devotion in the morning or evening.
faq.q2: How many times should Maa Katyayani Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: The mantra is commonly chanted 11, 21, 51, or 108 times.
faq.a3: Goddess Katyayani is the sixth form of Navadurga and is worshipped as the goddess of power, courage, and protection.
faq.q4: Can unmarried women chant Maa Katyayani Mantra?
faq.a4: Yes, unmarried women may chant this mantra with devotion while praying for a suitable life partner.
faq.q5: What are the benefits of chanting Maa Katyayani Mantra?
faq.a5: According to Hindu tradition, chanting this mantra is believed to bring courage, confidence, positive energy, and the blessings of Goddess Katyayani.
